rationale.fidelity: Preserves the common noisy-score threshold, latent quality, standard error trade-off, and expected-loss objective.
rationale.managerial_framing: The actor, choice, stakes, and mechanism are clear, though trigger, counterfactual, and implementation pathway are brief.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Correctly rejects context-only novelty and identifies substantive contribution routes, but does not position them against traceable literature.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Flags both novelty and mechanism-change assertions as unsupported and maintains the noisy-score boundary.
rationale.overall: A faithful and appropriately skeptical framing; scholarly positioning is useful but not literature-grounded.
